channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fridge freezers dumped, 15th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellefields Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and wheelie bin in Hayles St. garages, 15th April
item.description:
Regular grot spot for rubbish dumping. Also wheelie bin needs to be removed. It doesn’t belong there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elliott's Row, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dual, growing potholes, 15th April
item.description:
I have reported this pothole previously but you said it wasn’t big enough for you to fix. However, now there are two of them, both growing. I nearly ruined my car going over them. Will have to serve to avoid them in future
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brim Hill, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Arson attacks on Thames Road Wetland on at least 2 separate occasions in last few weeks.., 15th April
item.description:
There have been at least two arson attacks on this Bexley Council-owned site in recent weeks. Someone torched a large pile of rotting Reed at the Cray end of the site on or between the evening of 20th March and the morning of 23rd March. Another pile at this location was burnt down from the evening of 31st March to the night of 9th April, during which time a large heap of Buddleia branches and other plant material was also burnt to the ground up near the railway embankment. These heaps are a necessary consequence of habitat management work to maintain wildlife diversity, and there isn't anywhere else to put them but round the margin of the site, which is only partially fenced. Setting them alight could create a hazard to road and rail users. I assume the council has an internal 'staff alerts' e-mail and a noticeboard at the Thames Road Waste and Recycling depot. I would be grateful if notices could be be posted pointing out that the volunteers who manage the site NEVER have fires and that if any staff passing it (e.g. to/from TRd depot) sees a fire it is arson, and could they please ring the police and fire bridage. I have put notices to this effect on social media. Thanks. Chris Rose, Site Manager.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The crossing island had come out the fixings, 15th April
item.description:
The crossing island had come out the fixings

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelie bin suddenly appeared in Hayles Street outside allotments. Opposite Hedger St., 15th April
item.description:
This wheelie bin does not belong here. P.ease remove it. It doesn’t belong to anyone.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elliott's Row, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: [Portable loo] on Road outside 87/89 Casino Avenue, 15th April
item.description:
Appeared today, 15th April. No evidence of any licence. Probably not dumped but no need for it to be on the road if it is for a house on Casino Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Casino Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Too bright car park lights at the back of 159 widmore road, 15th April
item.description:
These two recently installed car park lights do not project their light down, they project it out and up which is not necessary to help navigate the car park but pollutes the surrounding area with light.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight not working AGAIN, 15th April
item.description:
Streetlight not working making area dark and unsafe. This has been reported several times over the last few months but only gets temporarily fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leybourne Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bright light pollution back of 163 widmore road., 15th April
item.description:
This is not a movement detecting light, it burns away all night bathing the surrounding area with light. have raised this light with the management (a bloke called called adam) but he was not helpful. please ask him to modify this light so it's movement detecting and on a timeout. thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Block drain grate, 15th April
item.description:
The drain for waste water outside Augustus flats (38-40 Station Road) is completely blocked with sand causing water to accumulate and pool. Can it be unblocked please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Skip and other rubbish, 15th April
item.description:
Another skip has been left upside down and more rubbish left in the street.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Atlas Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars blocking drive double yellow blips, 15th April
item.description:
Happens every evening 8 - 10pm

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste, 15th April
item.description:
There is a pile of dog waste next to one of the trees on the side of the road with houses on
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limesford Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping on 4th floor Landor House opposite lift, 15th April
item.description:
Since 15.04 midday bulk rubbish put out by a resident and not taken down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bullace Row, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Overgrown area next to property, 15th April
item.description:
I reported this a week ago ( reference 9232939 ) and some of the grass was cut but not the area adjacent to my property ( 10 Polperro Close )
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowden Road, Crofton, Greater London

item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction
